title: Planned roadworks in and around the M25: Weekly summary for Monday 17 November - Sunday 23 November
body: "M1 junction 3, Hertfordshire: Litter clearance The southbound entry and exit slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Thursday 20 November. A clearly signed diversion for the entry slip road will be in place via junction 5. A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road will be in place via junction 1.  M1 junction 4, Hertfordshire: Carriageway retexturing The southbound exit slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, on Tuesday 18 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 1, A1 and A41.  M3 junctions 2 to 3, Surrey: Major improvement The westbound carriageway will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, on  Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via the M25 junction 13, A30 and A322.  M4 junction 5, Berkshire: Carriageway sweeping The westbound exit slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 6.  M4 junction 4b, West Drayton: Carriageway sweeping The westbound link road to the M25 clockwise and anti-clockwise will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Thursday 20 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 5.  M20 junction 1, Kent: Lighting renewal work The westbound link road to the anti-clockwise M25 will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, for four nights from Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via the M25 junction 3 roundabout.  M23 junction 8, Surrey: Retexturing The southbound exit slip will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5:30am, on Monday 17 November.  A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 9.  M25 junction 12, Surrey: Major improvement The clockwise and anti-clockwise link roads to the M3 westbound will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, on Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via the M25 junction 13, A30, A322 and M3.  M25 junction 14 & T5, Middlesex: Carriageway sweeping The anti-clockwise exit and entry slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Thursday 20 November. A clearly signed diversion for the entry slip road (including T5 entry) will be in place via the A3113, A3044, A30 to join M25 at junction 13. A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road (including T5 exit) will be in place via junction 13.  M25 junction 15, Greater London: Carriageway sweeping/retexturing work The clockwise link road to the M4 westbound will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 17. The anti-clockwise link roads to the M4 east and west bound carriageways will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, for two nights from Tuesday 18 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 14.  M25 junction 17, Buckinghamshire : Carriageway resurfacing The anti-clockwise exit slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, for two nights from Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 16 and the M40 junction 1.  M25 junction 23, South Mimms: Carriageway sweeping The clockwise entry and exit slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion for the entry slip road will be in place via junction 22. A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road will be in place via junction 24.  M25 junction 24, Potters Bar: Carriageway sweeping The clockwise entry and exit slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Tuesday 18 November. A clearly signed diversion for the entry slip road will be in place via junction 23. A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road will be in place via junction 25.  M25 junction 25, Essex: Carriageway sweeping The clockwise entry and exit slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, on Thursday 20 November.  A clearly signed diversion for the entry slip road will be in place via junction 24. A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road will be in place via junction 26.  M25 junction 26, Essex: Major improvement The anti-clockwise entry and exit slip roads will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, for two nights from Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion route for the entry slip road will be in place via junction 28.  A clearly signed diversion for the exit slip road will be in place via junction 25.  M25 junction 27, Essex: Carriageway surfacing The clockwise link road to the M11 southbound will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, for five nights from Monday 17 November.  Work on Friday night will start at 11pm. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 28.  M25 junction 31, Essex : Carriageway resurfacing The anti-clockwise exit slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5am, for two nights from Wednesday 19 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 30.  A282 junction 1a, Kent: Signage work The anti-clockwise entry slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5:30am, for three nights from Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via junction 1b.  A282 junction 2, Kent: Signage work The anti-clockwise carriageway and entry slip road will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 5:30am, for five nights from Monday 17 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via the link road to junction 1b.  A282 (M25) Dartford – Thurrock Crossing: Maintenance work The following closures will be in place, with fully signed diversions for oversized vehicles for the northbound east tunnel closures.   Monday 17 November (10pm to 5am): northbound West Tunnel Tuesday 18 November (10pm to 5am): northbound West Tunnel Wednesday 19 November (10pm to 5am): northbound West Tunnel Thursday 20 November (10pm to 5am): northbound West Tunnel Friday 21 November (10pm to 5am): northbound West Tunnel Saturday 22 November (10pm to 5am) northbound East Tunnel Sunday 23 November (10pm to 5am) northbound West Tunnel   A406, Greater London: Litter clearance/Carriageway sweeping The eastbound link road to the M1 northbound will be closed overnight, between 10pm and 1.30am, on Wednesday 19 November. The westbound link road to the M1 northbound will be closed overnight, between 1.30am and 5am, on Thursday 20 November. A clearly signed diversion will be in place via Brent Cross.  A1089 Tilbury, Essex: Structure maintenance The carriageway between the Asda roundabout and the Tilbury Docks entrance road will be operating a contraflow system overnight, between 10pm and 5.30am, for five nights from Monday 17 November. Work overnight on Friday will be between 11pm and 6am.  Any abnormal loads wishing to pass through the contraflow will be required to pull into the layby either side of the works and call to be escorted. "
